I'll format this as a list of lists or a structured text block. - **Footer:** The document number, description, page number, legal text, and copyright. Let's refine the main body extraction. It's essentially a table without borders. Columns: 1. STYLE 1 THRU 5... 2. STYLE 6... 3. STYLE 7... 4. STYLE 8... 5. STYLE 9... 6. STYLE 10... 7. STYLE 11... 8. STYLE 12... 9. STYLE 13... 10. The "STYLE 27" and "STYLE 28" are at the bottom left, aligned with the other styles. The layout is essentially a grid of 6 columns and 5 rows (including the header row which is implicit).
